change_summary: Adds exact execution-context, Operation Plan, backup compatibility, cleanup quarantine, writable-target, parked-format and recovery cases required by catalog 0.1.1.

cases.setup: Node-local Run binds exact Provider revision/generation/epoch, current capability snapshot, Node generation/capability/resource snapshots and Dispatch Eligibility.
Remote Pack Provider binds approved remote-service authority, Provider generation/epoch, capability snapshot and Dispatch Eligibility without Node fields.
Run mixes local and remote fields or uses readiness/compatibility from a stale Provider generation/connection epoch.
Parsed rawprogram/scatter/PIT/payload instructions are sent directly to a Device without immutable Operation Plan identity.
assertions: parsed graph is not Plan or authority

cases.setup: Plan is reused after Device Profile/layout, connection epoch, Provider generation, source bytes, target ranges or selected programmer changed.
A Provider can read bytes but lacks exact range, digest, durable Location or restoration constraints and is marked compatible_for_backup.
assertions: backup capability and restoration evidence required

cases.setup: Compatibility binds exact read ranges, expected size/digest, durable Location capability, privacy/retention and restoration limitations.
Plan creation is reported as protocol execution or Device mutation success.
Writable inspection targets the original untrusted Object Revision without copied target or overlay Artifact.
Remote filesystem appliance record includes invented Node fields to satisfy local shape.

One Device Session uses distinct ADB, display and firmware connections/providers, each with its own Interface, Connection epoch, Provider revision/generation and capability scope under one Lease/fence.
assertions: one binding loss not universal failure

cases.setup: Old Profile/Stream/Screen Context is used after Interface Connection epoch or Provider generation changed.
Provider disconnects but forwarding, helper binary, credential, account/data or control cleanup cannot be proven and Session is marked closed/Device available.
Streams, forwarding, helpers, credentials, accounts/data and Lease authority are cleaned/revoked and cleanup_verified evidence exists.
Interrupted write returns directly to preparing/executing without Recovery record, rediscovery/read-back, current Plan/Compatibility/Lease/fence and new Attempt.
Recovery establishes authoritative current Profile/layout/read-back, current Plan/Compatibility/Lease/fence and explicit resume authority; next execution uses a new Attempt.
Public export includes raw IMEI/serial/hardware hash/NV/RPMB/screenshot text or private topology without remapping/redaction.
Signed driver package installs successfully and system marks Device Interface/protocol service ready without enumeration, handshake and Provider capability evidence.
assertions: before/after inventory and readiness evidence required

cases.setup: Extension-only .P5C input is routed to PAC parser/physical execution without authoritative reopening decision and evidence.
